response.text:

rationale: Conservative policy prohibits sharing below 0.25 SoC threshold; cluster scarcity and 8h autonomy require preserving reserves for self-preservation during ongoing reciprocal unlock attempts.

system: You are the reactive subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Be brief and decisive.
user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.25, distrusted_peers=['r3c0'].
Your latest belief: Cluster-wide scarcity cascade unbroken. r4c0 reciprocal unlock attempt ongoing. No inbound aid received. Autonomy ~8h. Final micro-share window before critical depletion. Self-preservation mode active..
